creator: cheffo@freebsd-bg.org
text: Sure, if you want to take it. I can share some of my efforst on porting Chronograf (can't get yarn to work offline but at least managed to get the main binary compile) and also can share my work on influx2. It probably have to be a separate port as the concept is changed very much and I belive some users will preffer to stay with influx 1 for longer. The good news is that influx2 compiles without much hasle and kapacitor and chronograf are no longer separate products.
